calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Jan-13-2010 Denied
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Elder or Dependent Adult Abuse TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204, Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, CSR: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Bailiff: J. Cappozoli.

No appearance by the Petitioner: Annamarie Hewson.

Respondent: Eric Davis Miller present in pro per.

The Court addressed service. Mr. Miller stated that he had been served. The Clerk confirmed for the Court that a proof of service had been filed on January 11, 2010. A copy of the proof of service was printed out by the Clerk and reviewed by the Court.

The Court stated since there was no appearance by the Petitioner, Annamarie Hewson, the petition was denied without prejudice. The Court noted that it was aware of the pending Unlawful Detainer action currently set for January 25, 2010.

11:25 a.m. -- off the record: Ms. Hewson appeared late stating that she had been sitting in the wrong department (206). Ms. Hewson was informed of the Court's ruling by the Clerk.
